summary: Iteration 14: PWA Install Banner Feature Testing - All 9 tests passed (100%). Tested banner appearance on beforeinstallprompt event, install button functionality, dismiss button with localStorage persistence, and regression tests for previous features.
passed_tests: 1. PWA install banner NOT visible by default on desktop - PASS
2. Banner appears when beforeinstallprompt event fires - PASS
3. Banner contains 'Installa l'App' text with Download icon - PASS
4. Install button (data-testid='pwa-install-btn') is visible and clickable - PASS
5. Dismiss button (data-testid='pwa-dismiss-btn') is visible and clickable - PASS
6. Click dismiss hides banner and sets localStorage 'pwa-banner-dismissed' = 'true' - PASS
7. After dismiss + reload, banner does NOT appear even if beforeinstallprompt fires - PASS
8. Install button calls installPrompt.prompt() when clicked - PASS
9. Banner hidden after user accepts install (userChoice.outcome = 'accepted') - PASS
regression_tests: Floating WhatsApp button visible and functional - PASS
Scroll-to-top button hidden initially, visible after scroll >400px - PASS
Scroll-to-top button scrolls to top when clicked - PASS
Booking modal opens when 'Prenota ora' is clicked - PASS
Main website loads without JS errors - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: WebsitePage.jsx: PWA install banner implementation is clean and follows React best practices
Lines 147-149: State management for installPrompt and showInstallBanner is correct
Lines 159-168: beforeinstallprompt listener checks localStorage first, respects user dismissal
Lines 170-178: handleInstall correctly calls prompt() and handles userChoice
Lines 180-183: dismissBanner sets localStorage to prevent future prompts
Lines 326-363: Banner JSX has proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (9/9 PWA banner tests + 5/5 regression tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested PWA install banner: 1) Banner with data-testid='pwa-install-banner' appears only when beforeinstallprompt fires, 2) Install button (data-testid='pwa-install-btn') calls prompt(), 3) Dismiss button (data-testid='pwa-dismiss-btn') hides banner and saves 'pwa-banner-dismissed' to localStorage, 4) localStorage persistence prevents banner from showing again after page reload. To test, simulate beforeinstallprompt: window.dispatchEvent(new Event('beforeinstallprompt')). Clear localStorage first: localStorage.removeItem('pwa-banner-dismissed').

pwa_install_banner_verified.description: Accesso rapido dalla home del telefono
